title: A 91-Day-Old Foundation Spent $500K in PA-3 — Rabb Receipts #shorts
description:
A Delaware foundation was barely three months old when it wired $500,000 to the PAC backing Dr. Ala Stanford in PA-3. The PAC then spent $3.5M backing Stanford. Chris Rabb still won.

Full episode: https://youtu.be/sodpDcNFUio
Full receipt: https://campaignreceipts.com/race/pa-3-2026-d-primary?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=cr-rabb-short-01-shell
